       ^        (-----------)  /----------\  /------------\  +--------------+  +-----------+  /-----------\  >--------+  +-------------+
<  Decision  >->|  Rounded  +->(  Circle  )->|  Database  +->|  Subroutine  +->(  Stadium  )-><  Hexagon  >->   Flag  +->|  Rectangle  |
       v        (-----------)  \----------/  \------------/  +--------------+  +-----------+  \-----------/  >--------+  +-------------+
